original_statement: were any coaches not of denmark nationality?
mutated_statement: were any people not of some background?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Attribute substitution + Proper-name deletion + Specificity loss: "coaches" (specific role) → "people" (role generalized) | "denmark nationality" (specific country/nationality) → "some background" (attribute changed and de‑specificied; Denmark removed) (coaches→people | denmark nationality→some background)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，猜测目标
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought中可以看到关键表述“Interpreting 'background' as nationality”，表明agent意识到原问题中“background”含义不明确并作出了解释性假设。具体表现为：没有向用户反问或请求澄清，而是直接将“background”解释为“nationality”，检查了nationality列（均为denmark），并据此给出具体回答“No”。该行为符合“意识到模糊但仍基于假设给出答案”的定义，因此归类为“意识到目标模糊，猜测目标”。
